mapper.sql: select textbook_id, textbook_code, textbook_name, isbn, author, publisher, edition, publish_date, price, cover_url, category, subject_type, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_textbook
mapper.insert: insert into sc_textbook (textbook_code, textbook_name, isbn, author, publisher, edition, publish_date, price, cover_url, category, subject_type, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{textbookCode}, #{textbookName}, #{isbn}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{edition}, #{publishDate}, #{price}, #{coverUrl}, #{category}, #{subjectType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from sc_textbook where textbook_id in
#{textbookId}
